creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text: P.S. I may invent/compose some more real looking names (even in different languages) for it being considered "full" (have both first and last name) if it may help. Still as being not official, this likely make some people feel wrong about it and not trust me for it. I'm also not sure whether it will be right even for me, so always use the pseudonym as the greatest common denominator between my official and real names.
